projects.notes:
This project defines the business and functional requirements for developing an AI-powered media
management platform for preschools enabling image and video capture, AI-based face recognition,
frame-level video analysis, and audio noise detection to ensure safe, high-quality content sharing with
parents automatically using AWS Rekognition AI-based face detection and tagging.
The goal is to eliminate manual sorting, ensure privacy compliance, and deliver personalized photo
galleries through mobile and web applications.

The proposed solution aims to provide a centralized business management system that streamlines Sales,
Purchase, and Expense operations, including lead tracking, project onboarding, vendor management,
purchase workflows, and employee expense tracking — all integrated within a unified platform.
The system will enhance productivity, improve communication, ensure financial accuracy, and provide
transparency across all business functions through role-based dashboards and reports

projects.notes:
Anant dwivedi Foundation
5.1.1 Common Website Tasks (All Pages)
•	Create responsive layout (Desktop / Tablet / Mobile)
•	Implement common header & footer
•	Navigation menu (add / edit / reorder menu items)
•	SEO meta tags (title, description)
•	Page load optimization
•	Cross-browser compatibility
•	Error / empty state handling
________________________________________
5.1.2 Home Page – Detailed Tasks
Partner Logos Section
•	Add partner logo
•	Edit partner logo
•	Delete partner logo
•	Upload logo image
•	Set display order
•	Enable / disable partner visibility
Banner / Slider
•	Add banner image
•	Edit banner image
•	Delete banner image
•	Reorder banners
•	Auto-scroll on/off
•	Mobile responsiveness check
Content Highlights
•	Add key message text
•	Edit content
•	Hide / show sections
•	Link sections to other pages
________________________________________
5.1.3 About Us Page – Detailed Tasks
Content Sections
•	Create sections (Vision, Mission, Values)
•	Edit section content
•	Delete / hide section
•	Manage text formatting
Team Section
•	Add team member
•	Edit team member details
•	Delete team member
•	Upload / update profile image
•	Set display order
Video Section (Optional)
•	Add video URL
•	Update video
•	Remove video
•	Enable / disable video section
________________________________________
5.1.4 Gallery Page – Detailed Tasks
Event Management
•	Create event folder
•	Edit event name / description
•	Delete event
•	Archive old events
Image Management
•	Upload images
•	Replace image
•	Delete image
•	Preview image
•	Assign image to event
•	Grid layout rendering
•	Lazy loading for performance
________________________________________
5.1.5 Contact Us Page – Detailed Tasks
Contact Information
•	Add contact details
•	Edit contact details
•	Update address / phone / email
•	Show / hide contact blocks
Contact Form
•	Create contact form fields
•	Validate form inputs
•	Submit form data
•	Store data in backend
•	Success / error messages
________________________________________
5.1.6 Projects & Reports Page – Detailed Tasks
Report Management (Frontend)
•	Display reports in tile/card format
•	Show report title, year, category
•	View report online
•	Download PDF
•	Pagination / load more
Filters
•	Filter by year
•	Filter by category
•	Search by report name
________________________________________
5.1.7 Annual Reports Page – Detailed Tasks
•	Upload annual report PDF
•	Edit report details
•	Delete report
•	Assign year
•	Sort reports year-wise
•	Download report
•	Archive old reports
________________________________________
5.2 Admin / Backend Panel (CMS)
5.2.1 Authentication & Access
•	Admin login
•	Logout
•	Forgot password
•	Role creation
•	Role-based permission control
________________________________________
5.2.2 Home Page Admin Tasks
•	Add / edit / delete partner logos
•	Upload banner images
•	Edit banner content
•	Reorder banners & partners
•	Enable / disable sections
________________________________________
5.2.3 Reports Management (Admin)
•	Upload PDF
•	Edit report metadata
•	Delete report
•	Assign category (Project / Annual)
•	Enable / disable report visibility
________________________________________
5.2.4 Gallery Management (Admin)
•	Create / edit / delete events
•	Upload multiple images
•	Delete images
•	Archive galleries
•	Preview gallery before publish
________________________________________
5.2.5 Content Management (Admin)
•	Edit About Us content
•	Update Vision / Mission / Values
•	Manage team members
•	Upload images
•	Save / publish changes
________________________________________
5.2.6 Contact Form Management (Admin)
•	View form submissions
•	Filter by date
•	Mark as resolved / unresolved
•	Delete submissions
•	Export data (CSV / Excel)
________________________________________
5.3 Payment Gateway (Deferred Scope)
•	Payment module placeholder
•	Enable / disable donation section
•	(No development in Phase-1)
________________________________________
5.4 Non-Functional Tasks
•	Security validation
•	Data protection
•	Performance testing
•	UI/UX consistency
•	Scalability planning
